last_context: Vision update: Generalized Tier 1 Text Action system from selection-only text rewrite to full three-dimensional system (captureScope flags + applyMode enum + transform). Updated data/text-action.md, features/text-actions-three-tier.md, features/windows-os-integration.md (added P9), flows/tier1-hotkey-rewrite.md (expanded to general flow covering all capture scopes + apply modes), vision-summary.md, feature-inventory.md, edge-cases.md.

Google Cloud Storage dependency for backups

Git wiki version control — GitHub token storage requires DPAPI encryption
Model comparison — per-panel multi-turn conversations = N independent API streams
Model comparison M spec simplified — Accept auto-saves branches, per-panel mini-chats
Language & RTL (Q) feature may be out of scope — user chose English-only
